description_long: This is a standard 12 fl oz Coca-Cola can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The exterior is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around the can, and additional branding and product information in smaller white text. The can has a metallic, glossy finish that reflects light, and the top is open, revealing the silver interior. A barcode and nutritional information are visible on the back, while the front displays the large Coca-Cola logo. The can appears undamaged, with no visible dents or scratches, and the surface is smooth and hard. This object is commonly found in urban environments such as streets, parks, and public spaces, often as a discarded item or in use as a beverage container.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic finish, and an open top. The can is smooth, cylindrical, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background, with the open metallic top visible.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the barcode, nutritional information, and smaller Coca-Cola logo, with the open top still visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the word 'Coke' in large white letters, with minimal branding details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a more subtle part of the logo and the red metallic surface with minimal text.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo and text on a red background, barcode, nutritional information, and 'Coke' branding; all in a classic, bold style.
